issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks in post-referral and pre-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were generating double tasks across post-referral and pre-referral workflows. The issue was traced to a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. HubSpot support was engaged and confirmed the fix.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or delete the duplicate tasks on affected deal records.

issues.title: Automated SMS messages not sending for pre-referral leads
issues.desc: Automated SMS messages stopped going out for multiple leads across MRC and lender lead types, with the last confirmed SMS observed around January 30, 2026. The issue was suspected to be an integration problem between HubSpot and the backend or RingCentral. A product ticket was created to investigate.
issues.workaround: Manually send any missed SMS outreach to leads who entered the pre-referral workflow between approximately January 30 and February 11, 2026.

issues.title: Automated emails showing incorrect loan officer after LO change
issues.desc: When a loan officer was updated on a deal, automated emails continued to display the previous LO's information instead of the newly assigned one. The affected deal was showing the old LO (Paul) instead of the updated LO (Julie Yocum). The issue was resolved by Luis.
issues.workaround: For any leads where an LO change occurred during the impact window, manually resend the agent introduction email with the correct LO information.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: The post-referral workflow continued generating check-in tasks for deals that had been marked as Closed Lost or Transferred, meaning HAs and TCs were receiving tasks for deals that should have been inactive. A filter tweak was applied to the workflow to suppress tasks for these deal stages.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any lingering check-in tasks on deals marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering when deal stage toggled back to Offer Accepted
issues.desc: When a deal was set to Offer Accepted, then reverted to Referred Active or Committed (e.g., due to a fallen contract), and then moved back to Offer Accepted, the workflow tasks did not re-trigger for the TC. The root cause was that 'deal stage = offer accepted' was not listed as a re-enrollment criterion in the workflow. This was updated to allow re-enrollment.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that were toggled back to Offer Accepted between March 16 and the fix date to ensure TCs receive the correct closing tasks.

issues.title: MRC deals marked Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow
issues.desc: MRC leads updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering the TC workflow, meaning TCs were not receiving tasks to collect closing information. The issue was investigated with HubSpot support and a fix was confirmed. Leads without an assigned loan officer were particularly affected as MRC deals typically never have an LO assigned.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted between approximately March 14 and April 1, 2026 and send closing info collection emails manually in the interim.
